ab: Awi, uka sinaw micyo ka sapah da, usa mari sinaw micyo ka isu.
ch: W:Awi，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: Qabus, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: Niqan kingal rusuq ka pchdanan nina, ana ini bari pa!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: Ini tuku ka kingal rusuq, usa mari dha rusuq dungan.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: Mari ku sinaw micyo, niqan namu pbari hu?
ch: m:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: Niqan hmi! Khnu ka briyun su?
ch: w:有啊!你要買多少?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: Mari ku dha rusuq, mari ku kingal lubuy buwax uri.
ch: m:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: Ni ka buwax, manu nina ka briyun su dungan hu?
ch: w:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: Mari ku balung nina, niqan namu pbari uri hu?
ch: m:我還要買蛋，你們也有賣嗎?
en: I want to buy eggs, do you sell them too?

ab: Wada qduwan mari ka balung nami da.
ch: w:我們的蛋賣完了。
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: Mari ku lukus.
ch: m:我要買衣服。
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: So mnmnu ka sntangan su hu?
ch: w:你想要什麼樣子的呢?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: Mari ku butun ucux na lukus.
ch: m:我要買短袖的衣服。
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: Hmuya ka mbanah lukus ni?
ch: w:這件紅色的如何?
en: How about this red one?

ab: Niqan ini pntna kluwanan rakaw niya hu?
ch: M:有其他別的顏色嗎?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: Niqan nami rakaw mbhuway mi rakaw mcayis mi rakaw tmkarac na.
ch: W:我們還有白色、黃色和藍色。
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: Biqi ku kal lukus rakaw tmkarac.
ch: m:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Temu, mnusa su inu ka soni da? Mnusa su undo hu?
ch: W:Temu，你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: Temu, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: Uxay, mnusa ku dmayaw bubu rudan mu pbari sama.
ch: M:不是，我去幫奶奶賣菜。
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: So kiya hay! Niqan diyax su kman saya? Supu ta mkan idaw haw?
ch: W:這樣啊！你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯？
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: Uxay! Musa ku mari lukus.
ch: M:不行！我要去買衣服。
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: Snolun misu musa.
ch: W:那我跟你一起去。
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: Sndamac su balay, khnu pila ka bnkiyan sama ni?
ch: m:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: Mpusal krtan pila ka kingal bnkiyan sama.
ch: w:菜一把20元。
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: Piya pila ka bunga ni?
ch: m:這個地瓜多少錢?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: Mturul krtan pila ka kingal toting bunga.
ch: w:地瓜一斤30元
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: Biqi ku dha bnkiyan sama mi kingal toting bunga.
ch: m:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
